===================
===================
=== Radio City 10-18-88.txt
===================
===================
===================
OLD MEN WITH BROKEN TEETH
no label 2CDR

Great companion to the classic boot "Stuck Inside Of New York", which featured
the 10/19/88 Radio City show. This is the complete show from the previous
night, with filler from the 17th to round out disc 2.

rmd: [from the disc's originator] A great lost tape that relatively few people 
have heard. I never see it on anyone's trade list. That's a shame, because 
this is probably the strongest and tightest of the 1988 shows. 
Not only that, but it's an amazingly good quality audience tape.

Conversion:  CDR>EAC(secure)>MKW Audio Compression Tool>shn
Conversion by: tbuick6

(Disc 1) Radio City Music Hall (New York, NY); 10-18-1988
(Disc 2 Tracks 1-6) Radio City Music Hall (New York, NY); 10-18-1988
(Disc 2 Tracks 7-12)Radio City Music Hall (New York, NY); 10-17-1988

Tracklist: 
Disc 1
1.Subterranean Homesick Blues
2.Just Like A Woman
3.Masters Of War
4.Shelter From The Storm
5.Bob Dylan's 115th Dream
6.Stuck Inside Of Mobile(With The Memphis Blues Again)
7.Gates Of Eden
8.With God On Our Side
9.Girl From The North Country
10.I Shall Be Released
11.Silvio

Disc 2 
1.Like A Rolling Stone
2.Waggoner's Lad
3.To Ramona
4.Knockin' On Heaven's Door
5.In The Garden
6.All Along the Watchtower

7.I'll Remember You
8.Ballad Of A Thin Man
9.You're A Big Girl Now
10.Highway 61 Revisited
11.One Too Many Mornings
12.Maggie's Farm
